description: Hard module-pair conflicts that should be blocked or explicitly reviewed before export.

P0.title: No patent grant conflicts with defensive patent suspension.
P0.message: P4 suspends patent rights only if patent rights exist first.

S0.title: No Hosted Service conflicts with network-triggered duties.
S0.message: Hosted-service duties are impossible or misleading when hosted service use is prohibited.

S1.title: Internal Hosting conflicts with external network obligations.
S1.message: External hosted source offers, service modification disclosure, and hosted export rights do not fit an internal-only hosting grant.

R0.title: No Redistribution conflicts with distribution-triggered duties.
R0.message: Distribution-triggered duties should not be active when redistribution is prohibited.

R1.title: Unmodified Redistribution conflicts with derivative distribution duties.
R1.message: R1 permits exact copies only, while these duties assume modified downstream distributions.

M0.title: No Modification conflicts with derivative obligations.
M0.message: Derivative-work obligations should not be active when creating derivatives is prohibited.

M1.title: Private Modification conflicts with public derivative duties.
M1.message: Private-only modification does not support public share-alike, source disclosure, naming, or change-back triggers.
